AI News & Updates

Use AI to Create French Relaxed Illustrations and Add Warm Storytelling to Your Brand

Learn how to generate warm French cafe-style illustration visuals with Ideogram V3 on FuseAI Tools. This guide includes copy-ready JSON parameters, star-rated output analysis, style direction tables, and practical prompt tips for lifestyle brands, blogs, and social media.

Use AI to Create a Cinematic Dusk Lakeside Scene for Calm, Magical Brand Visuals

Learn how to generate a cinematic dusk lakeside landscape with Ideogram V3 on FuseAI Tools. This guide includes copy-ready JSON parameters, visual analysis, brand text integration tips, and advanced prompting techniques for premium website and campaign visuals.

Use AI to Create Natural Candid Fashion Editorials—No More Stiff Poses

Learn how to generate a natural, candid street-style fashion portrait with GPT-image-1.5 on FuseAI Tools. This guide includes copy-ready parameters, lighting/composition strategy, scenario customization tables, and practical prompt tips to make AI images look like real photographer captures.

Learn how to generate emotionally rich pet portraits with GPT-image-1.5 on FuseAI Tools. This guide includes copy-ready parameters, prompt strategy, star-rated quality analysis, and practical customization tips for pet brands and emotional storytelling content.

Create a Cyberpunk City Nightscape with AI and Build a Futuristic Cinematic Visual

This tutorial shows how to use Seedance Text-to-Video on FuseAI Tools to generate a cyberpunk-style futuristic city night aerial clip. Includes copy-ready parameters, result analysis, recommended use cases, and prompt optimization tips for production-ready AI video assets.

Learn how to use Seedance Text-to-Video on FuseAI Tools to create a cinematic “reunion in the rain” narrative clip for brand storytelling. Includes copy-ready parameters, emotional scene design, shot planning, and advanced prompt tips for high-impact social campaigns.

This tutorial shares a complete, copy-ready cinematic cover recipe using the Qwen text-to-image model on FuseAI Tools. You’ll get a proven parameter JSON (prompt, negative prompt, inference steps, guidance scale, acceleration, and more), result analysis, and practical tweaking tips to improve click-through rates.

Learn how to generate emotionally resonant brand storytelling visuals with Qwen text-to-image on FuseAI Tools. This guide shares a copy-ready JSON setup, scene design logic, prompt strategy, and practical optimization tips for creating warm, realistic campaign images.

Image

AI First & Last Frame Images: Nezha vs Ao Bing’s 100m Sprint — Seedream Tutorial

Generate matching start and finish frames for image-to-video workflows using Seedream 5 Lite on FuseAI Tools. Copy-ready prompts and JSON (16:9, high quality), myth-inspired character styling, result analysis, consistency tips, and a direct link to the companion Seedance video tutorial.

From Images to Video: Seedance I2V — Props Race & Fight (Nezha & Ao Bing)

Turn two still frames into a 12-second cinematic clip with Seedance 1.5 Pro on FuseAI Tools. Uses the Nezha/Ao Bing sprint frames as input URLs, a detailed motion prompt (ribbon, ice, weapons clash), parameter table, example MP4, storyboard beats, tuning tips, FAQ, and a link back to the Seedream first/last frame tutorial.
